  "findings": [
    "Cotter pin omitted on castle nut of steering/suspension joint",
    "High risk of castle nut backing off under operational vibration",
    "Potential loss of steering control or suspension separation"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately remove the asset from service",
    "Inspect the castle nut and ball joint/tie rod threads for damage",
    "Torque the castle nut to OEM specification",
    "Install a new, properly sized cotter pin and bend it securely"
  ],
  "rationale": "A castle nut on a critical steering or suspension joint requires a cotter pin to prevent it from backing off due to vibration. Omitting this safety-critical locking device on an in-service asset is a severe non-compliance that can lead to catastrophic mechanical failure and loss of vehicle control.",
  "references": [
    "OEM Assembly Specifications",
    "Standard Automotive Quality Gates"
  ]
}
